creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Please refer to https://github.com/hockeypuck/hockeypuck/releases where the 2.1 is discussed and available since Dec 2020.  

Notable is "All ECC algorithms supported by GnuPG 2.x are now supported by Hockeypuck".  Previously x25519 could not be verified.

Thank-you.
